import re, json

with open\('/Users/jashwanth/Downloads/JobAgent_v5_7.jsx', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract M628_RAW
m = re.search\(r'const M628_RAW = \(\\[.*?\\]\);', content, re.DOTALL\)
data = json.loads\(m.group\(1\)\)

# Generate the M628 object array
lines = []
for c in data:
    name, tier, h1b_raw, itar_raw, industry, roles, atsPlatform, domain, atsBoardUrl = c
    h1b = "YES" if h1b_raw == 1 else \("NO" if h1b_raw == 0 else h1b_raw\)
    itar = "YES" if itar_raw == 1 else \("NO" if itar_raw == 0 else itar_raw\)
    lines.append\(f'  {{name:{json.dumps\(name\)},tier:{tier},h1b:{json.dumps\(h1b\)},itar:{json.dumps\(itar\)},industry:{json.dumps\(industry\)},roles:{json.dumps\(roles\)},atsPlatform:{json.dumps\(atsPlatform\)},domain:{json.dumps\(domain\)},atsBoardUrl:{json.dumps\(atsBoardUrl\)}}}'\)

print\(f"Total companies: {len\(lines\)}"\)
print\("First 5 entries:"\)
for l in lines[:5]:
    print\(l\)
PYEOF)
